report_name: Japan Forms Public-Private Task Force to Counter AI-Driven Cyber Threats like 'Mythos'

tools.name: Mythos
tools.description: An advanced AI model developed by Anthropic with a powerful capability for discovering software vulnerabilities. Its potential misuse by malicious actors for automated vulnerability discovery and exploit generation is a significant concern for the Japanese government.

identities.name: Government of Japan
identities.description: Led by Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, the government initiated a public-private collaboration to address cybersecurity risks from advanced AI models like Mythos.

identities.name: Sanae Takaichi
identities.description: Prime Minister of Japan who instructed officials to implement countermeasures against AI-driven cyber threats.

identities.name: Financial Services Agency
identities.description: Japanese government agency leading the public-private working group to defend the financial sector against AI-driven threats.

identities.name: Bank of Japan
identities.description: A member of the public-private working group formed to counter AI-driven cyber threats in Japan's financial sector.

identities.name: MUFG Bank
identities.description: One of Japan's three megabanks participating in the public-private working group to defend against AI-driven cyber threats.

identities.name: Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation
identities.description: One of Japan's three megabanks participating in the public-private working group to defend against AI-driven cyber threats.

identities.name: Mizuho Bank
identities.description: One of Japan's three megabanks participating in the public-private working group to defend against AI-driven cyber threats.

identities.name: Japan Exchange Group
identities.description: A member of the public-private working group focused on hardening Japan's financial sector against AI-driven threats.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: U.S. AI startup that developed the 'Mythos' model and is participating in Japan's public-private working group to help defend against its capabilities.
